title: aristolochia kaempferi var. laevipes
intro: Aristolochia kaempferi var. laevipes is a variety of the Aristolochia kaempferi plant, commonly known as the 'Chinese birthwort' or 'tang-kuei,' which belongs to the Aristolochiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which have been attributed to the presence of aristolochic acids. The health benefits of Aristolochia kaempferi var. laevipes include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its use is often cautioned due to potential toxicity and side effects.
